root.m_Talk_ENG: Just like how I got unlimited support from all of you guys, my dear Takodachis, I hope my love and support would reach you guys as well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's a steep climb up the mountain called life, but I'm sure the view from the top will be unforgettable especially with you guys by my side!
root.m_Talk_TWN: It's a steep climb up the mountain called life, but I'm sure the view from the top will be unforgettable especially with you guys by my side!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Es ist ein steiler Aufstieg auf den Berg namens Leben, aber ich bin mir sicher, dass die Aussicht von oben unvergesslich sein wird, besonders mit euch an meiner Seite!
